name: marketflow
description: 大盘数据看板 - A股/港股/美股

scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../quant && uv sync
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:quant"
scripts.dev:quant: cd quant && uv run uvicorn app:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.start: npm run start:backend && npm run start:frontend
